---
title: "The European Union's Approach to Multilingualism in its Own Communication Policy"
author: "Mendez, C., Gazzola, M., Clement-Wilz, L., Triga, V., Mendez, F., Djouvas, C., Charalampous, A. and Bachtler, J."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "Research for CULT Committee — European Parliament. IPOL_STU(2022)699648"
categories:
  [Media and Social Media Monitoring, Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/multilingo.png
---
